title: [Crash] System.InvalidOperationException: When in VirtualMode the ListView RetrieveVirtualListItem event needs a list view...
author: zgabi
body_snippet:
## Crash Report
I got this error when built the program from latest source, so probably it is version 1.81+, not 1.80.2 as it was auto generated:
commit 91f2937532a0f6c417ea7a478d44d48c8abc87ad
Date:   Fri Mar 13 20:09:43 2026 +0200

### Exception
**Type:** `System.InvalidOperationException`
**Message:** When in VirtualMode the ListView RetrieveVirtualListItem event needs a list view SubItem for each ListView column.

### Stack Trace
```
   at void System.Windows.Forms.ListView.WmReflectNotify(r...

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
Hi @zgabi, thanks for reporting this!

This is a regression from our fix for #52 — the placeholder item we create during the race condition didn't have SubItems for each column, which triggers this `InvalidOperationException` in VirtualMode.

**Already fixed** — the placeholder now includes empty SubItems for each column. The fix will be in the next push.

Thanks for helping us catch this quickly!
